name: My work neck claim got denied, now what in Ogden UT?
description: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days; add evidence.[7]

mainEntity.name: My work neck claim got denied, now what in Ogden UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days; add evidence.[7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of denial notice.[7] Request a hearing before an ALJ.[1] Key factors: (1) Gather more medical proof of causation; (2) Challenge insurer's IME; (3) Attorney fees if unreasonable denial.[2] File promptly to revive claim. Persistence pays off.
